name: Jewel Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Butter and flour a large baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the sifted all-purpose flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, kirsch, Grand Marnier, and almond extract.
5. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Stir in the chopped almonds and cherries.
7. Spoon the dough onto the prepared baking sheet and form it into a strip about 10 inches long, 5 inches wide, and 1/2 inch thick.
8. Bake for 45 minutes, or until set and firm to the touch but not hard.
9. Remove from the oven and slice diagonally with a serrated knife into 1/2-inch slices. Discard any thick end pieces.
10. Arrange the slices on the baking sheet and return to the oven for an additional 45 to 60 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Let cool for about 5 minutes on the baking sheet before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
12. Store in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks.
